name: Thermal Conductivity Calculator
description: Industrial-grade thermal conductivity analysis tool for materials, insulation, and heat transfer systems. Compliant with ISO 8301, ASTM C518, and Lean Six Sigma DMAIC principles.

inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Select the material category to apply appropriate thermal conductivity ranges and correction factors per ISO 8301.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the material category to apply appropriate thermal conductivity ranges and correction factors per ISO 8301.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygun termal iletkenlik aralıklarını ve ISO 8301'e göre düzeltme faktörlerini uygulamak için malzeme kategorisini seçin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie die Materialkategorie aus, um geeignete Wärmeleitfähigkeitsbereiche und Korrekturfaktoren gemäß ISO 8301 anzuwenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez la catégorie de matériau pour appliquer les plages de conductivité thermique et les facteurs de correction appropriés selon la norme ISO 8301.

inputs.label: Operating Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Mean temperature of the material during operation. Affects phonon scattering and electron transport in solids.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mean temperature of the material during operation. Affects phonon scattering and electron transport in solids.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışma sırasında malzemenin ortalama sıcaklığı. Katılarda fonon saçılmasını ve elektron taşınımını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mittlere Temperatur des Materials während des Betriebs. Beeinflusst Phononenstreuung und Elektronentransport in Festkörpern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température moyenne du matériau en fonctionnement. Affecte la diffusion des phonons et le transport électronique dans les solides.

inputs.label: Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Material thickness in the direction of heat flow. Used for thermal resistance calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Material thickness in the direction of heat flow. Used for thermal resistance calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Isı akışı yönünde malzeme kalınlığı. Termal direnç hesaplaması için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Materialdicke in Richtung des Wärmeflusses. Wird für die Berechnung des Wärmewiderstands verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur du matériau dans la direction du flux thermique. Utilisée pour le calcul de la résistance thermique.

inputs.label: Cross-Sectional Area
inputs.businessContext: Area perpendicular to heat flow. Critical for heat flux density calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Area perpendicular to heat flow. Critical for heat flux density calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Isı akışına dik alan. Isı akısı yoğunluğu hesaplamaları için kritiktir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fläche senkrecht zum Wärmefluss. Entscheidend für die Berechnung der Wärmestromdichte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface perpendiculaire au flux thermique. Critique pour les calculs de densité de flux thermique.

inputs.label: Heat Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Steady-state heat transfer rate through the material. Measured via calorimeter or heat flux sensor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Steady-state heat transfer rate through the material. Measured via calorimeter or heat flux sensor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme boyunca kararlı durum ısı transfer hızı. Kalorimetre veya ısı akısı sensörü ile ölçülür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stationäre Wärmeübertragungsrate durch das Material. Gemessen mittels Kalorimeter oder Wärmeflusssensor.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de transfert thermique en régime permanent à travers le matériau. Mesuré par calorimètre ou capteur de flux thermique.

inputs.label: Temperature Difference
inputs.businessContext: Temperature gradient across the material thickness. Drives conductive heat transfer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature gradient across the material thickness. Drives conductive heat transfer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme kalınlığı boyunca sıcaklık gradyanı. İletim yoluyla ısı transferini yönlendirir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperaturgradient über die Materialdicke. Treibt die Wärmeleitung an.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Gradient de température à travers l'épaisseur du matériau. Entraîne le transfert de chaleur par conduction.

inputs.label: Moisture Content
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of moisture by volume. Increases effective thermal conductivity in porous materials (WERC guidelines).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of moisture by volume. Increases effective thermal conductivity in porous materials (WERC guidelines).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hacimce nem yüzdesi. Gözenekli malzemelerde etkin termal iletkenliği artırır (WERC yönergeleri).
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumenprozent Feuchtigkeit. Erhöht die effektive Wärmeleitfähigkeit in porösen Materialien (WERC-Richtlinien).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'humidité en volume. Augmente la conductivité thermique effective dans les matériaux poreux (directives WERC).

inputs.label: Aging Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier accounting for material degradation over time. Based on Six Sigma aging studies.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier accounting for material degradation over time. Based on Six Sigma aging studies.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zamanla malzeme bozulmasını hesaba katan çarpan. Altı Sigma yaşlanma çalışmalarına dayanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für Materialverschlechterung über Zeit. Basierend auf Six Sigma-Alterungsstudien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur tenant compte de la dégradation du matériau dans le temps. Basé sur des études de vieillissement Six Sigma.

rules.message: Temperature difference exceeds 50% of absolute temperature. Check for phase change or measurement error.
Moisture content above 5% in insulation foam significantly degrades thermal performance per ASTM C518.
Heat flux exceeds 10 kW/m². Verify cooling capacity and material limits.

thresholds.message: Effective thermal conductivity exceeds 400 W/(m·K). Typical for pure metals only. Verify inputs.
Thermal resistance below 0.5 m²·K/W. Insulation may be inadequate for building envelope per ISO 6946.
Thermal efficiency below 60%. Consider material replacement or design review (Lean Six Sigma).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
